title: GitHub - CyrusNuevoDia/gpt-workflow: Deterministic multi-agent workflows
excerpt: Deterministic multi-agent workflows. Contribute to CyrusNuevoDia/gpt-workflow development by creating an account on GitHub.
content_html:
A deterministic multi-agent workflow runtime powered by Codex App Server. Control flow — loops, branches, retries — is plain JavaScript in your script; agent() delegates bounded judgment to Codex threads, and parallel(), pipeline(), and child workflow() calls fan that work out.

Compared to driving Codex directly, a workflow adds:

  • Resumability — long or token-expensive runs replay completed calls from a durable journal instead of paying for them again.
  • Validated structured output — pass a JSON schema to agent() and the runtime validates the reply and retries invalid ones, instead of you policing format in prompt text.
  • Multi-agent verification — independent critics and judge panels, where a failed call resolves to null instead of aborting the fan-out.

Install

Everything requires Bun 1.3 or newer, with the Codex CLI installed and authenticated for live runs. Node.js is not a supported runtime.

The preferred install is the Codex plugin. It bundles a skill that authors, runs, and debugs workflows for you, and it runs the published CLI through bunx, so there is no separate package to install:

codex plugin marketplace add CyrusNuevoDia/gpt-workflow
codex plugin add gpt-workflow@gpt-workflow

Restart the ChatGPT desktop app after installing and start a new task so the bundled skill loads; see plugin installation and behavior.

To drive the CLI yourself, install globally:

bun add --global gpt-workflow

For library use:

bun add gpt-workflow

Write a workflow

Store project workflows under .codex/workflows/; this example is summarize-files.js:

export const meta = {
  name: "summarize-files",
  description: "Summarize files concurrently and merge the findings"
}

const files = args.files
const summaries = await parallel(
  files.map((file) => () =>
    agent(`Read ${file} and return three factual bullets.`, {
      label: `summarize:${file}`
    })
  )
)

return { summaries: summaries.filter(Boolean) }

args is the run's input; the --args flag in the next section supplies it.

If an agent's thread ends in an error, times out, returns no final message, or exhausts its structured-output retries, that call resolves to null and is recorded in the run's failures — the filter(Boolean) drops those slots. Script bugs, setup problems such as missing models or bad option types, cancellation, worktree-setup failures, and transport failures reject the whole run instead.

Workflow source is trusted repository code; it runs inside node:vm as a semantic boundary, not a security sandbox for hostile JavaScript.

Run and resume

A live run spends model tokens. Resume replays completed calls from the journal — their tokens are not spent again — then runs the rest live:

gpt-workflow models
gpt-workflow run --default-model gpt-5.6-luna \
  --args '{"files":["src/cli.ts","src/runtime.ts"]}' \
  .codex/workflows/summarize-files.js
gpt-workflow run --default-model gpt-5.6-luna --resume workflow-123 \
  --args '{"files":["src/cli.ts","src/runtime.ts"]}' \
  .codex/workflows/summarize-files.js

--default-model supplies the model for agent() calls that omit options.model; without either, the run rejects with a model error. --args takes strict JSON and becomes the script's args global; pass a plain string as quoted JSON, e.g. --args '"triage"'. Invalid JSON exits 1 with a usage error on stderr before any record is emitted. For --resume, substitute the runId reported by your original run's records — real IDs look like workflow-<uuid>; these examples shorten it to workflow-123. Resume with the same --args: changed args change prompts, which miss the journal and run live.

models prints every model discovered from the authenticated App Server as NDJSON without spending model tokens. Run accepts repeatable --required-model flags plus --request-timeout-ms, --thread-start-timeout-ms, and --turn-timeout-ms. SIGINT or SIGTERM cancels active agents, records a terminal failure, flushes persisted events, and exits nonzero.

Stdout is ordered NDJSON; human diagnostics go to stderr. Every record includes schemaVersion, sequence, runId, scriptPath, runDirectory, ts (epoch milliseconds), and type. The opening run.started record carries the script's meta; the final run.completed record carries meta, result, usage, failures, and journalPath:

{"meta":{"name":"summarize-files","description":"Summarize files concurrently and merge the findings"},"type":"run.started","runDirectory":"/repo/.codex/workflows/runs/workflow-123","runId":"workflow-123","schemaVersion":1,"scriptPath":"/repo/.codex/workflows/summarize-files.js","sequence":0,"ts":1783971328984}
{"failures":[],"journalPath":"/repo/.codex/workflows/runs/workflow-123/journal.jsonl","meta":{"name":"summarize-files","description":"Summarize files concurrently and merge the findings"},"result":{"summaries":["…","…"]},"type":"run.completed","usage":{"agentCount":2,"liveAgentCount":2,"modelUsage":{"gpt-5.6-luna":{"liveAgentCount":2,"replayedAgentCount":0,"subagentTokens":3412}},"peakConcurrentAgents":2,"replayedAgentCount":0,"subagentTokens":3412},"runDirectory":"/repo/.codex/workflows/runs/workflow-123","runId":"workflow-123","schemaVersion":1,"scriptPath":"/repo/.codex/workflows/summarize-files.js","sequence":9,"ts":1783971339402}

If the run fails, the CLI emits a run.failed record with the error and exits non-zero. Agent-side null failures don't fail the run: they stay visible in the run.completed record's failures and are retried on resume.

Inspect past runs

There is no need to tee the stream for later inspection: every run also persists a filtered copy of its NDJSON to .codex/workflows/runs/<runId>/events.jsonl — the run, phase, and agent status records needed to rebuild run state, without the high-volume streaming deltas. Two commands read it back without spending model tokens:

gpt-workflow list
gpt-workflow status workflow-123

list prints one JSON line per run, newest first, with runId, name, scriptPath, status, timestamps, and — once the run ended — finishedAt, failureCount, and usage. status prints one JSON object that adds ordered phases, per-agent progress and token totals, and the final result and failures. Output is plain JSON, so jq applies:

gpt-workflow status workflow-123 | jq '.phases'

A run with no terminal record reports "incomplete": an in-flight and an interrupted run look identical on disk, so the CLI never claims "running" — check lastEventAt for staleness. An unknown run ID makes status exit 1 with an error on stderr.

Durable journals

Live runs persist an append-only replay journal at:

.codex/workflows/runs/<runId>/journal.jsonl

The same directory holds events.jsonl, the inspection copy described above; the journal remains the only replay substrate.

Resume reuses that runId and directory. Completed agent() calls are matched by their prompt and options, regardless of the order they finished in; at the first call with no journal match, that call and every later call runs live and appends to the same journal.

To inspect a journal, parse it one record at a time with parseWorkflowJournalEntry — Getting started shows a streaming loop. The parser throws a SyntaxError on blank text, malformed JSON, or records that are not valid journal entries; it never returns null, so wrap each parse in try/catch when surveying a damaged journal.

The journal is workflow replay state. Codex separately persists full agent thread rollouts and exposes them through App Server thread APIs; their private on-disk layout is not a gpt-workflow contract.

Library API

import {
  AppServerClient,
  REQUIRED_APP_SERVER_MODELS,
  runWorkflowScript
} from "gpt-workflow"

const source = `
export const meta = {
  name: "summarize",
  description: "Summarize a topic"
}

return await agent("Summarize " + args.topic)
`

const client = await AppServerClient.connect({
  defaultModel: "gpt-5.6-luna",
  requiredModels: REQUIRED_APP_SERVER_MODELS
})

try {
  const execution = await runWorkflowScript(source, {
    appServer: client,
    args: { topic: "deterministic orchestration" }
  })
  console.log(execution.result, execution.journalPath)
} finally {
  await client.close()
}

Running this example spends model tokens; inject agent to drive offline tests without Codex. REQUIRED_APP_SERVER_MODELS is the model set the runtime depends on — connect rejects when the App Server cannot start or is missing any of them. runWorkflowScript accepts runDirectory for caller-owned storage and resumeFromRunId for library resume, and splits failures exactly as Write a workflow describes: agent-side failures resolve to null and land in execution.failures; everything else rejects. listRunSummaries and readRunStatus expose the list and status data programmatically; see the API reference.

Documentation

Start with Getting started or the full documentation index. Structured output schemas, budgets, agent options, and child workflows are covered in the API reference; verification and fan-out shapes in Patterns.

Migrating Claude Code workflows? See the Claude parity ledger and the migration checklist.

Working on this repository itself? See AGENTS.md.

blocks.html_en: A deterministic multi-agent workflow runtime powered by Codex App Server. Control flow — loops, branches, retries — is plain JavaScript in your script; agent() delegates bounded judgment to Codex threads, and parallel(), pipeline(), and child workflow() calls fan that work out.

sentences.en: A deterministic multi-agent workflow runtime powered by Codex App Server.
sentences.zh: 由 Codex App Server 提供支持的确定性多代理工作流程运行时。

sentences.en: Control flow — loops, branches, retries — is plain JavaScript in your script; agent() delegates bounded judgment to Codex threads, and parallel(), pipeline(), and child workflow() calls fan that work out.
sentences.zh: 控制流——循环、分支、重试——是脚本中的纯 JavaScript； agent() 将有界判断委托给 Codex 线程，parallel()、pipeline() 和子工作流() 调用 fan 进行计算。

blocks.html_en: Compared to driving Codex directly, a workflow adds:

sentences.en: Compared to driving Codex directly, a workflow adds:
sentences.zh: 与直接驱动 Codex 相比，工作流程增加了：

blocks.html_en: • Resumability — long or token-expensive runs replay completed calls from a durable journal instead of paying for them again.

sentences.en: Resumability — long or token-expensive runs replay completed calls from a durable journal instead of paying for them again.
sentences.zh: 可恢复性——长时间或象征性昂贵的运行会重放持久日志中已完成的调用，而不是再次付费。

blocks.html_en: • Validated structured output — pass a JSON schema to agent() and the runtime validates the reply and retries invalid ones, instead of you policing format in prompt text.

sentences.en: Validated structured output — pass a JSON schema to agent() and the runtime validates the reply and retries invalid ones, instead of you policing format in prompt text.
sentences.zh: 验证的结构化输出 - 将 JSON 模式传递给 agent()，运行时验证回复并重试无效回复，而不是在提示文本中监管格式。

blocks.html_en: • Multi-agent verification — independent critics and judge panels, where a failed call resolves to null instead of aborting the fan-out.

sentences.en: Multi-agent verification — independent critics and judge panels, where a failed call resolves to null instead of aborting the fan-out.
sentences.zh: 多代理验证——独立的评论家和评审小组，失败的调用解析为空，而不是中止扇出。

sentences.en: If an agent's thread ends in an error, times out, returns no final message, or exhausts its structured-output retries, that call resolves to null and is recorded in the run's failures — the filter(Boolean) drops those slots.
sentences.zh: 如果代理的线程以错误结束、超时、未返回最终消息或耗尽其结构化输出重试，则该调用将解析为 null 并记录在运行失败中 - 过滤器（布尔值）会删除这些槽。

sentences.en: Script bugs, setup problems such as missing models or bad option types, cancellation, worktree-setup failures, and transport failures reject the whole run instead.
sentences.zh: 脚本错误、设置问题（例如缺少模型或错误的选项类型）、取消、工作树设置失败和传输失败会拒绝整个运行。

sentences.zh: 工作流来源是受信任的存储库代码；它在 node:vm 内运行作为语义边界，而不是敌对 JavaScript 的安全沙箱。

sentences.zh: 实时运行会花费模型代币。

sentences.zh: Resume 重放日志中已完成的调用——它们的代币不会再次被花费——然后实时运行其余的：

sentences.zh: --default-model 为省略 options.model 的 agent() 调用提供模型；如果没有其中任何一个，运行就会因模型错误而被拒绝。 --args 采用严格的 JSON 并成为脚本的全局 args；传递一个普通字符串作为引用的 JSON，例如--args '“分类”'。

sentences.en: Invalid JSON exits 1 with a usage error on stderr before any record is emitted.
sentences.zh: 在发出任何记录之前，无效的 JSON 会退出 1，并在 stderr 上出现使用错误。

sentences.en: Resume with the same --args: changed args change prompts, which miss the journal and run live.
sentences.zh: 使用相同的 --args: 更改参数更改提示继续，这会丢失日志并实时运行。

sentences.zh: Stdout 是有序的 NDJSON；人类诊断结果会发送至 stderr。

sentences.en: Every record includes schemaVersion, sequence, runId, scriptPath, runDirectory, ts (epoch milliseconds), and type.
sentences.zh: 每条记录包括 schemaVersion、序列、runId、scriptPath、runDirectory、ts（纪元毫秒）和类型。

sentences.en: The opening run.started record carries the script's meta; the final run.completed record carries meta, result, usage, failures, and journalPath:
sentences.zh: 开头的 run.started 记录携带脚本的元数据；最终的 run.completed 记录包含元、结果、用法、失败和日志路径：

blocks.html_en: If the run fails, the CLI emits a run.failed record with the error and exits non-zero. Agent-side null failures don't fail the run: they stay visible in the run.completed record's failures and are retried on resume.

sentences.en: If the run fails, the CLI emits a run.failed record with the error and exits non-zero.
sentences.zh: 如果运行失败，CLI 会发出包含错误的 run.failed 记录并以非零值退出。

sentences.en: Agent-side null failures don't fail the run: they stay visible in the run.completed record's failures and are retried on resume.
sentences.zh: 代理端空失败不会使运行失败：它们在 run.completed 记录的失败中保持可见，并在恢复时重试。

blocks.html_en: Inspect past runs

sentences.en: Inspect past runs
sentences.zh: 检查过去的运行情况

blocks.html_en: There is no need to tee the stream for later inspection: every run also persists a filtered copy of its NDJSON to .codex/workflows/runs/<runId>/events.jsonl — the run, phase, and agent status records needed to rebuild run state, without the high-volume streaming deltas. Two commands read it back without spending model tokens:

sentences.en: There is no need to tee the stream for later inspection: every run also persists a filtered copy of its NDJSON to .codex/workflows/runs/<runId>/events.jsonl — the run, phase, and agent status records needed to rebuild run state, without the high-volume streaming deltas.
sentences.zh: 无需为以后检查而创建流：每次运行还会将其 NDJSON 的过滤副本保留到 .codex/workflows/runs/<runId>/events.jsonl — 重建运行状态所需的运行、阶段和代理状态记录，而无需大量流增量。

sentences.en: Two commands read it back without spending model tokens:
sentences.zh: 两个命令可以在不花费模型令牌的情况下读回它：

blocks.html_en: list prints one JSON line per run, newest first, with runId, name, scriptPath, status, timestamps, and — once the run ended — finishedAt, failureCount, and usage. status prints one JSON object that adds ordered phases, per-agent progress and token totals, and the final result and failures. Output is plain JSON, so jq applies:

sentences.en: list prints one JSON line per run, newest first, with runId, name, scriptPath, status, timestamps, and — once the run ended — finishedAt, failureCount, and usage.
sentences.zh: list 每次运行打印一个 JSON 行，最新的在前，包含 runId、名称、scriptPath、状态、时间戳，以及运行结束后的 finishAt、failureCount 和使用情况。

sentences.en: status prints one JSON object that adds ordered phases, per-agent progress and token totals, and the final result and failures.
sentences.zh: status 打印一个 JSON 对象，该对象添加有序阶段、每个代理进度和令牌总数以及最终结果和失败。

sentences.en: Output is plain JSON, so jq applies:
sentences.zh: 输出是纯 JSON，因此 jq 适用：

blocks.html_en: A run with no terminal record reports "incomplete": an in-flight and an interrupted run look identical on disk, so the CLI never claims "running" — check lastEventAt for staleness. An unknown run ID makes status exit 1 with an error on stderr.

sentences.en: A run with no terminal record reports "incomplete": an in-flight and an interrupted run look identical on disk, so the CLI never claims "running" — check lastEventAt for staleness.
sentences.zh: 没有终端记录的运行报告“不完整”：进行中的运行和中断的运行在磁盘上看起来相同，因此 CLI 永远不会声明“正在运行”——检查 lastEventAt 是否过时。

sentences.en: An unknown run ID makes status exit 1 with an error on stderr.
sentences.zh: 未知的运行 ID 会使状态退出 1，并在 stderr 上出现错误。

blocks.html_en: Durable journals

sentences.en: Durable journals
sentences.zh: 耐用的日记本

blocks.html_en: Live runs persist an append-only replay journal at:

sentences.en: Live runs persist an append-only replay journal at:
sentences.zh: 实时运行会在以下位置保留仅附加重播日志：

blocks.html_en: The same directory holds events.jsonl, the inspection copy described above; the journal remains the only replay substrate.

sentences.en: The same directory holds events.jsonl, the inspection copy described above; the journal remains the only replay substrate.
sentences.zh: 同一目录包含 events.jsonl，即上述检查副本；该日志仍然是唯一的重播基材。

blocks.html_en: Resume reuses that runId and directory. Completed agent() calls are matched by their prompt and options, regardless of the order they finished in; at the first call with no journal match, that call and every later call runs live and appends to the same journal.

sentences.en: Resume reuses that runId and directory.
sentences.zh: Resume 重用该 runId 和目录。

sentences.en: Completed agent() calls are matched by their prompt and options, regardless of the order they finished in; at the first call with no journal match, that call and every later call runs live and appends to the same journal.
sentences.zh: 已完成的 agent() 调用将根据其提示和选项进行匹配，无论其完成顺序如何；在没有日志匹配的第一次调用时，该调用和以后的每个调用都会实时运行并附加到同一个日志。

blocks.html_en: To inspect a journal, parse it one record at a time with parseWorkflowJournalEntry — Getting started shows a streaming loop. The parser throws a SyntaxError on blank text, malformed JSON, or records that are not valid journal entries; it never returns null, so wrap each parse in try/catch when surveying a damaged journal.

sentences.en: To inspect a journal, parse it one record at a time with parseWorkflowJournalEntry — Getting started shows a streaming loop.
sentences.zh: 要检查日记，请使用 parseWorkflowJournalEntry 一次解析一条记录 - 入门显示一个流循环。

sentences.en: The parser throws a SyntaxError on blank text, malformed JSON, or records that are not valid journal entries; it never returns null, so wrap each parse in try/catch when surveying a damaged journal.
sentences.zh: 解析器对空白文本、格式错误的 JSON 或无效日记条目的记录抛出 SyntaxError；它永远不会返回 null，因此在调查损坏的日志时将每个解析包装在 try/catch 中。

blocks.html_en: The journal is workflow replay state. Codex separately persists full agent thread rollouts and exposes them through App Server thread APIs; their private on-disk layout is not a gpt-workflow contract.

sentences.en: The journal is workflow replay state.
sentences.zh: 该日志是工作流重放状态。

sentences.en: Codex separately persists full agent thread rollouts and exposes them through App Server thread APIs; their private on-disk layout is not a gpt-workflow contract.
sentences.zh: Codex 单独保留完整的代理线程部署，并通过 App Server 线程 API 公开它们；它们的私有磁盘布局不是 gpt 工作流合同。

blocks.html_en: Library API

sentences.en: Library API
sentences.zh: 库API

blocks.html_en: Running this example spends model tokens; inject agent to drive offline tests without Codex. REQUIRED_APP_SERVER_MODELS is the model set the runtime depends on — connect rejects when the App Server cannot start or is missing any of them. runWorkflowScript accepts runDirectory for caller-owned storage and resumeFromRunId for library resume, and splits failures exactly as Write a workflow describes: agent-side failures resolve to null and land in execution.failures; everything else rejects. listRunSummaries and readRunStatus expose the list and status data programmatically; see the API reference.

sentences.en: Running this example spends model tokens; inject agent to drive offline tests without Codex.
sentences.zh: 运行此示例会花费模型代币；注入代理以在没有 Codex 的情况下驱动离线测试。

sentences.en: REQUIRED_APP_SERVER_MODELS is the model set the runtime depends on — connect rejects when the App Server cannot start or is missing any of them.
sentences.zh: REQUIRED_APP_SERVER_MODELS 是运行时所依赖的模型集 - 当应用程序服务器无法启动或缺少其中任何一个时，连接会被拒绝。

sentences.en: runWorkflowScript accepts runDirectory for caller-owned storage and resumeFromRunId for library resume, and splits failures exactly as Write a workflow describes: agent-side failures resolve to null and land in execution.failures; everything else rejects.
sentences.zh: runWorkflowScript 接受 runDirectory 作为调用者拥有的存储，并resumeFromRunId 作为库恢复，并完全按照编写工作流程描述的方式拆分失败：代理端失败解析为 null 并进入执行。其他一切都拒绝。

sentences.en: listRunSummaries and readRunStatus expose the list and status data programmatically; see the API reference.
sentences.zh: listRunSummaries 和 readRunStatus 以编程方式公开列表和状态数据；请参阅 API 参考。

blocks.html_en: Documentation

sentences.en: Documentation
sentences.zh: 文档

blocks.html_en: Start with Getting started or the full documentation index. Structured output schemas, budgets, agent options, and child workflows are covered in the API reference; verification and fan-out shapes in Patterns.

sentences.en: Start with Getting started or the full documentation index.
sentences.zh: 从入门或完整文档索引开始。

sentences.en: Structured output schemas, budgets, agent options, and child workflows are covered in the API reference; verification and fan-out shapes in Patterns.
sentences.zh: API 参考中涵盖了结构化输出模式、预算、代理选项和子工作流程；模式中的验证和扇出形状。

blocks.html_en: Migrating Claude Code workflows? See the Claude parity ledger and the migration checklist.

sentences.en: Migrating Claude Code workflows?
sentences.zh: 迁移 Claude 代码工作流程？

sentences.en: See the Claude parity ledger and the migration checklist.
sentences.zh: 请参阅克劳德奇偶校验账本和迁移清单。

blocks.html_en: Working on this repository itself? See AGENTS.md.

sentences.en: Working on this repository itself?
sentences.zh: 在这个存储库本身上工作吗？

sentences.en: See AGENTS.md.
sentences.zh: 请参阅 AGENTS.md。

content_html_zh:
由 Codex App Server 提供支持的确定性多代理工作流程运行时。 控制流——循环、分支、重试——是脚本中的纯 JavaScript； agent() 将有界判断委托给 Codex 线程，parallel()、pipeline() 和子工作流() 调用 fan 进行计算。

与直接驱动 Codex 相比，工作流程增加了：

  • 可恢复性——长时间或象征性昂贵的运行会重放持久日志中已完成的调用，而不是再次付费。
  • 验证的结构化输出 - 将 JSON 模式传递给 agent()，运行时验证回复并重试无效回复，而不是在提示文本中监管格式。
  • 多代理验证——独立的评论家和评审小组，失败的调用解析为空，而不是中止扇出。

安装

一切都需要 Bun 1.3 或更高版本，并安装 Codex CLI 并进行实时运行验证。 Node.js 不是受支持的运行时。

首选安装是 Codex 插件。 它捆绑了为您创作、运行和调试工作流程的技能，并通过 Bunx 运行已发​​布的 CLI，因此无需安装单独的软件包：

codex plugin marketplace add CyrusNuevoDia/gpt-workflow
codex plugin add gpt-workflow@gpt-workflow

安装后重新启动 ChatGPT 桌面应用程序并启动新任务，以便加载捆绑的技能；请参阅插件安装和行为。

要自行驱动 CLI，请全局安装：

bun add --global gpt-workflow

供图书馆使用：

bun add gpt-workflow

编写工作流程

将项目工作流程存储在 .codex/workflows/ 下；这个例子是summary-files.js：

export const meta = {
  name: "summarize-files",
  description: "Summarize files concurrently and merge the findings"
}

const files = args.files
const summaries = await parallel(
  files.map((file) => () =>
    agent(`Read ${file} and return three factual bullets.`, {
      label: `summarize:${file}`
    })
  )
)

return { summaries: summaries.filter(Boolean) }

args 是运行的输入；下一节中的 --args 标志提供了它。

如果代理的线程以错误结束、超时、未返回最终消息或耗尽其结构化输出重试，则该调用将解析为 null 并记录在运行失败中 - 过滤器（布尔值）会删除这些槽。 脚本错误、设置问题（例如缺少模型或错误的选项类型）、取消、工作树设置失败和传输失败会拒绝整个运行。

工作流来源是受信任的存储库代码；它在 node:vm 内运行作为语义边界，而不是敌对 JavaScript 的安全沙箱。

运行并恢复

实时运行会花费模型代币。 Resume 重放日志中已完成的调用——它们的代币不会再次被花费——然后实时运行其余的：

gpt-workflow models
gpt-workflow run --default-model gpt-5.6-luna \
  --args '{"files":["src/cli.ts","src/runtime.ts"]}' \
  .codex/workflows/summarize-files.js
gpt-workflow run --default-model gpt-5.6-luna --resume workflow-123 \
  --args '{"files":["src/cli.ts","src/runtime.ts"]}' \
  .codex/workflows/summarize-files.js

--default-model 为省略 options.model 的 agent() 调用提供模型；如果没有其中任何一个，运行就会因模型错误而被拒绝。 --args 采用严格的 JSON 并成为脚本的全局 args；传递一个普通字符串作为引用的 JSON，例如--args '“分类”'。 在发出任何记录之前，无效的 JSON 会退出 1，并在 stderr 上出现使用错误。 对于 --resume，替换原始运行记录报告的 runId — 真实 ID 类似于工作流-<uuid>；这些示例将其缩短为工作流程 123。 使用相同的 --args: 更改参数更改提示继续，这会丢失日志并实时运行。

models 将从经过身份验证的应用程序服务器发现的每个模型打印为 NDJSON，而无需花费模型令牌。 Run 接受可重复的 --required-model 标志加上 --request-timeout-ms、--thread-start-timeout-ms 和 --turn-timeout-ms。 SIGINT 或 SIGTERM 取消活动代理、记录终端故障、刷新持久事件并以非零值退出。

Stdout 是有序的 NDJSON；人类诊断结果会发送至 stderr。 每条记录包括 schemaVersion、序列、runId、scriptPath、runDirectory、ts（纪元毫秒）和类型。 开头的 run.started 记录携带脚本的元数据；最终的 run.completed 记录包含元、结果、用法、失败和日志路径：

{"meta":{"name":"summarize-files","description":"Summarize files concurrently and merge the findings"},"type":"run.started","runDirectory":"/repo/.codex/workflows/runs/workflow-123","runId":"workflow-123","schemaVersion":1,"scriptPath":"/repo/.codex/workflows/summarize-files.js","sequence":0,"ts":1783971328984}
{"failures":[],"journalPath":"/repo/.codex/workflows/runs/workflow-123/journal.jsonl","meta":{"name":"summarize-files","description":"Summarize files concurrently and merge the findings"},"result":{"summaries":["…","…"]},"type":"run.completed","usage":{"agentCount":2,"liveAgentCount":2,"modelUsage":{"gpt-5.6-luna":{"liveAgentCount":2,"replayedAgentCount":0,"subagentTokens":3412}},"peakConcurrentAgents":2,"replayedAgentCount":0,"subagentTokens":3412},"runDirectory":"/repo/.codex/workflows/runs/workflow-123","runId":"workflow-123","schemaVersion":1,"scriptPath":"/repo/.codex/workflows/summarize-files.js","sequence":9,"ts":1783971339402}

如果运行失败，CLI 会发出包含错误的 run.failed 记录并以非零值退出。 代理端空失败不会使运行失败：它们在 run.completed 记录的失败中保持可见，并在恢复时重试。

检查过去的运行情况

无需为以后检查而创建流：每次运行还会将其 NDJSON 的过滤副本保留到 .codex/workflows/runs/<runId>/events.jsonl — 重建运行状态所需的运行、阶段和代理状态记录，而无需大量流增量。 两个命令可以在不花费模型令牌的情况下读回它：

gpt-workflow list
gpt-workflow status workflow-123

list 每次运行打印一个 JSON 行，最新的在前，包含 runId、名称、scriptPath、状态、时间戳，以及运行结束后的 finishAt、failureCount 和使用情况。 status 打印一个 JSON 对象，该对象添加有序阶段、每个代理进度和令牌总数以及最终结果和失败。 输出是纯 JSON，因此 jq 适用：

gpt-workflow status workflow-123 | jq '.phases'

没有终端记录的运行报告“不完整”：进行中的运行和中断的运行在磁盘上看起来相同，因此 CLI 永远不会声明“正在运行”——检查 lastEventAt 是否过时。 未知的运行 ID 会使状态退出 1，并在 stderr 上出现错误。

耐用的日记本

实时运行会在以下位置保留仅附加重播日志：

.codex/workflows/runs/<runId>/journal.jsonl

同一目录包含 events.jsonl，即上述检查副本；该日志仍然是唯一的重播基材。

Resume 重用该 runId 和目录。 已完成的 agent() 调用将根据其提示和选项进行匹配，无论其完成顺序如何；在没有日志匹配的第一次调用时，该调用和以后的每个调用都会实时运行并附加到同一个日志。

要检查日记，请使用 parseWorkflowJournalEntry 一次解析一条记录 - 入门显示一个流循环。 解析器对空白文本、格式错误的 JSON 或无效日记条目的记录抛出 SyntaxError；它永远不会返回 null，因此在调查损坏的日志时将每个解析包装在 try/catch 中。

该日志是工作流重放状态。 Codex 单独保留完整的代理线程部署，并通过 App Server 线程 API 公开它们；它们的私有磁盘布局不是 gpt 工作流合同。

库API

import {
  AppServerClient,
  REQUIRED_APP_SERVER_MODELS,
  runWorkflowScript
} from "gpt-workflow"

const source = `
export const meta = {
  name: "summarize",
  description: "Summarize a topic"
}

return await agent("Summarize " + args.topic)
`

const client = await AppServerClient.connect({
  defaultModel: "gpt-5.6-luna",
  requiredModels: REQUIRED_APP_SERVER_MODELS
})

try {
  const execution = await runWorkflowScript(source, {
    appServer: client,
    args: { topic: "deterministic orchestration" }
  })
  console.log(execution.result, execution.journalPath)
} finally {
  await client.close()
}

运行此示例会花费模型代币；注入代理以在没有 Codex 的情况下驱动离线测试。 REQUIRED_APP_SERVER_MODELS 是运行时所依赖的模型集 - 当应用程序服务器无法启动或缺少其中任何一个时，连接会被拒绝。 runWorkflowScript 接受 runDirectory 作为调用者拥有的存储，并resumeFromRunId 作为库恢复，并完全按照编写工作流程描述的方式拆分失败：代理端失败解析为 null 并进入执行。其他一切都拒绝。 listRunSummaries 和 readRunStatus 以编程方式公开列表和状态数据；请参阅 API 参考。

文档

从入门或完整文档索引开始。 API 参考中涵盖了结构化输出模式、预算、代理选项和子工作流程；模式中的验证和扇出形状。

迁移 Claude 代码工作流程？ 请参阅克劳德奇偶校验账本和迁移清单。

在这个存储库本身上工作吗？ 请参阅 AGENTS.md。
